name: Sobha Central
researcher_notes: Sobha Central is a mixed-use development on Sheikh Zayed Road comprising six high-rise residential towers with a retail podium, community zones, and an urban park on the podium level.

Six confirmed tower names from Sobha Realty's official website: The Pinnacle, The Eden, The Mirage, The Tranquil, The Serene, and The Horizon. Harness listings reference 'The Pinnacle at Sobha Central' specifically.
The Mirage was launched after Sobha Central reached AED 3.5 billion in sales (Arabian Business, Nov 2025), indicating strong absorption.
Property Finder and Harper Wellington list The Horizon and The Tranquil with Q4 2029 handover and a 60/40 payment plan. The Horizon launch price cited at AED 1.52M–1.68M for 1-bed units.

Sobha Realty Metro Station (Red Line, formerly DAMAC Properties Metro Station) is located on Sheikh Zayed Road between Dubai Marina and JLT — the brochure states Sobha Central is within walking distance of Jebel Ali Metro Station; sources reference both stations in the vicinity. Exact walking distance to each station is unverified.
The official brochure references a dedicated fly-out bridge from the second-floor podium and two dedicated traffic lanes, described as rare infrastructure for a residential mixed-use project.
Propsearch.ae notes 50 DLD sale transactions recorded for Sobha Central as of research date; the project is off-plan with first completion targeted December 2029.

Drive-time estimates sourced from Propsearch.ae: ~26 min to Dubai Mall, ~18 min to Palm Jumeirah, ~23 min to Burj Al Arab, ~20 min to The Walk JBR, ~34 min to DXB, ~30 min to Al Maktoum International Airport.

Schools data from Propsearch.ae: five British curriculum schools within 5 km (notably Arcadia Global School rated 4.7/5 and Dubai British School Jumeirah Park rated 4.2/5); one Indian curriculum school within 5 km (Delhi Private School Dubai); no American curriculum schools within 5 km but five within 10 km.

ROI figures from the LinkedIn article (Source 10) appear to be from a third-party promotional piece and cite unverified sources; they have been flagged and excluded from investment data. No verified DLD rental yield data exists for Sobha Central itself as the project is off-plan.

The LinkedIn article (Source 10) places Sobha Central in 'Al Furjan' — this conflicts with the official brochure and Sobha Realty's own materials which place it on Sheikh Zayed Road near JLT/Jebel Ali. The Al Furjan reference is likely erroneous and has been disregarded.

Property Finder lists The Horizon under 'Jebel Ali' area classification; Sobha's brochure references proximity to Jebel Ali Metro Station. The broader address is Sheikh Zayed Road, with JLT and Jebel Ali as the nearest classified districts.
Sobha Realty reported AED 30 billion (~USD 8.17bn) in 2025 sales, 30% YoY growth (Arabian Business, Jan 2026).
Sobha completed a USD 750 million green sukuk in Sep 2025 — the largest ever by a real estate developer.

overview.description: Sobha Central is a large-scale mixed-use development on Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai's most prominent urban corridor. It comprises six elegantly designed high-rise residential towers integrated with a retail podium, an urban park on the podium level, commercial spaces, and extensive leisure amenities. The development is positioned as a self-sustained high-living community blending design, connectivity, and functionality.
overview.payment_plan_example: 60/40 (confirmed for The Tranquil and The Horizon); 20/40/40 also referenced for The Horizon on Property Finder
overview.sales_milestone: AED 3.5 billion in sales recorded prior to The Mirage launch (Nov 2025)

development_level.headline_stats: Six-tower mixed-use development on Sheikh Zayed Road; AED 3.5 billion+ in sales recorded; Q4 2029 first handover; 50 DLD transactions already registered.
development_level.scarcity_argument: Sobha Central occupies a rare Sheikh Zayed Road address with freehold ownership, dedicated podium-level urban park, and infrastructure-grade road access (fly-out bridge, dedicated ramp) typically reserved for landmark commercial hubs — a genuine first in Dubai's mixed-use landscape per the developer.
development_level.lifestyle_pitch: Live at the intersection of Dubai's most iconic corridor and a self-contained urban village: rooftop retreats, an urban park, a grand prayer hall, a retail mall, fitness facilities, and jogging tracks — all within your building complex, with Dubai Marina, DIFC, and Downtown Dubai minutes away.
development_level.investment_pitch: Freehold on Sheikh Zayed Road with metro walkability, backed by a developer that posted AED 30 billion in 2025 sales and completed a USD 750 million green sukuk. The Jebel Ali area recorded 74.9% YoY price growth. Strong pre-handover DLD transaction activity signals market confidence.
development_level.objection_handling: For buyers concerned about off-plan risk: Sobha Realty's backward integration model — in-house design, manufacturing, and construction — reduces third-party execution risk. The developer has a multi-decade track record across Dubai and internationally, and has already achieved AED 3.5 billion in Sobha Central sales, demonstrating deep market validation.

per_sub_development.the_pinnacle: Flagship tower name for Sobha Central; ideal entry point for buyers seeking the brand's most recognised sub-address within the community.
per_sub_development.the_tranquil: Confirmed pricing from AED 1.48M with 60/40 plan and Q4 2029 handover — one of the more accessible entry points in the community.
per_sub_development.the_horizon: Most transaction data available; recent DLD sales at AED 2.03M–2.59M confirm active market. Widest range of floor plan types (568–1,553 sqft).
per_sub_development.the_mirage: Launched after AED 3.5 billion milestone — latest release signals continued project momentum and potential for early-buyer capital appreciation.

location.area: Sheikh Zayed Road, Jebel Ali / JLT corridor, Dubai
location.description: Sobha Central sits directly on Sheikh Zayed Road — Dubai's primary urban spine — offering residents unparalleled connectivity to Downtown Dubai, DIFC, Dubai Marina, and Business Bay. The development is near the Sobha Realty Metro Station (Red Line) and Jebel Ali Metro Station, with the Dubai Tram accessible via the metro interchange. A dedicated fly-out bridge from the podium and a dedicated ramp-in provide rare infrastructure-grade road access.

investment.branded_premium_note: Sobha Realty's backward integration model — controlling design, manufacturing, and construction in-house — is cited as a quality and delivery differentiator. The developer reported AED 30 billion in 2025 sales and completed a USD 750 million green sukuk, the largest ever by a real estate developer.

sales_talking_points.location: Only mixed-use freehold development with direct Sheikh Zayed Road frontage, metro walkability, and infrastructure-grade road access (dedicated podium fly-out bridge) in this corridor.
sales_talking_points.developer_credibility: Sobha Realty's backward integration model, AED 30bn in 2025 sales, and USD 750M green sukuk demonstrate financial strength and delivery capability.
sales_talking_points.community_depth: Six towers, an urban park, a retail mall, a grand prayer hall, and a full amenity suite create a self-contained community — not just a tower.
sales_talking_points.momentum: AED 3.5 billion in sales before The Mirage launch; 50 DLD transactions already registered; recent secondary market activity on The Horizon pre-handover.
sales_talking_points.connectivity: Red Line metro walkability, Dubai Tram access, and direct SZR frontage place residents within 20–34 minutes of all major Dubai destinations.

prompt_data.developer_track_record: Sobha Realty was founded in 1976 by PNC Menon and pioneered the backward integration model in real estate — maintaining in-house control over design, engineering, manufacturing, construction, and delivery. The company operates across UAE, Oman, Bahrain, Brunei, and India. In Dubai, its portfolio spans Sobha Hartland, Sobha Hartland II, Sobha One, Sobha SeaHaven, Sobha Reserve, Sobha Orbis, Sobha Solis, Sobha Sanctuary, Sobha Elwood, and Sobha Central. In 2025, the group reported AED 30 billion in sales (30% YoY growth) and completed a USD 750 million green sukuk — the largest ever by a real estate developer — dual-listed on the London Stock Exchange and Nasdaq Dubai.

audit_flags: Exact walking distance from Sobha Central to Sobha Realty Metro Station and Jebel Ali Metro Station is unverified — brochure states 'within walking distance of Jebel Ali Metro Station' without a specific distance
ROI/yield projections for Sobha Central are unavailable — project is off-plan with no DLD rental data; third-party promotional ROI figures (LinkedIn Source 10) are unverified and excluded
Pricing for The Pinnacle, The Eden, The Mirage, and The Serene towers is not confirmed in available sources
Handover dates for The Pinnacle, The Eden, The Mirage, and The Serene are not individually confirmed — Q4 2029 is confirmed only for The Tranquil and The Horizon
Healthcare facility distances are unverified — Aster and Mediclinic Parkview referenced in Property Finder content without confirmed proximity data
School fee and rating data sourced from WhichSchoolAdvisor via Propsearch.ae — individual school names beyond Arcadia Global School and Dubai British School Jumeirah Park not listed in source
LinkedIn article (Source 10) contains unverified claims including Al Furjan location, specific ROI percentages, and guaranteed rental yields — treated as unreliable promotional content
Bayut listing URLs provided as source but listing content was not directly accessible in research; used as reference only

The Horizon area classification varies across sources (Jebel Ali per Property Finder; JLT per some third-party descriptions) — official Sobha materials reference Sheikh Zayed Road address without a specific sub-district
No verified DLD transaction data available for The Pinnacle specifically — 50 total Sobha Central transactions per Propsearch.ae but not broken down by tower
